title: Amtech S3965 150mm (6") Wall brush
features: VERSATILE: 150mm (6") wall brush can be used with interior and exterior paints, emulsion, stains and varnishes and is ideal for smooth, rough or textured surfaces; it can also be used as a splash brush
EASY TO USE: It has a comfortable, shaped wooden handle
HANGING HOLE: The brush has a convenient hanging hole for storage
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains Brush See more
